site.title: Themadhood's Creations
site.tagline: Physical and digital goods created under the Themadhood ecosystem.
site.metaDescription: Themadhood's Creations handles handmade and crafted items, including mixed-media builds and unique project creations.

footer.title: Themadhood's Creations
footer.line2: Themadhood's Creations operates as a parent entity for affiliated projects.

hero.headline: Themadhood's Creations
body: Themadhood's Creations is the handmade and crafted creations division within Themadhood's Goods, focused on producing mixed-media builds and unique project creations while maintaining the visual style and themes associated with Themadhood.

about.title: ABOUT US
body: Themadhood's Creations operates as both an independent creative workshop and a structured branch within the larger Themadhood ecosystem. Its purpose is to design and produce handmade and crafted items that reflect the themes, ideas, and visual identity developed across Themadhood projects.

Through mixed-media builds and unique project creations, Themadhood's Creations provides a framework for organizing physical creations while allowing each line of projects to develop its own style and focus. This structure ensures that goods remain connected to the broader creative ecosystem while still supporting unique craftsmanship and experimentation.

items.title: Other/ Routed Through Us
items.body: Requests that don’t clearly fall under a specific creations subtree, including custom or experimental builds.

contact.title: CONNECT WITH US
contact.note: GitHub Pages is static-only. If you want submissions, wire this up to Formspree/Netlify Forms later.
